title: I tested the Eufy Omni S2 robotic vacuum — and it's expensive and impressive in equal measure
excerpt: Excellent wet and dry cleaning, a brilliant app, and a super smart dock make the Omni S2 worth the asking price
content_html:
Eufy has taken the excellent mopping performance of the Omni S1 and paired it with vastly improved vacuuming to create the Omni S2. A self-cleaning and self-emptying robotic vacuum and mop, the S2 is as impressive as it is expensive, with excellent navigation skills, reliable obstacle avoidance and a brilliant app too. It even features an integrated detergent bottle and comes with three fragrance capsules that leave your home smelling nice after every clean. It does it all, but such knock-out performance comes at an equally shocking price.

Pros

  • +

    Superb mopping

  • +

    Powerful vacuuming

  • +

    Stylish, premium design

  • +

    Great mapping and navigation

Cons

  • -

    Seriously expensive

  • -

    Very occasional navigation issues

  • -

    Hardware failure necessitated a replacement unit

Eufy Omni S2: two-minute review

Eufy’s latest flagship robotic vacuum and mop, the Omni S2 is a hugely impressive appliance that combines excellent mopping with brilliant vacuuming to create one of the best home cleaning systems you can buy. It also self-cleans so thoroughly that, after several weeks of daily use, the dust bin, rollers and mop still looked like new.

The Omni S2 uses warm water to clean its spinning mop as it goes, while also scraping away dirt and using cyclone technology to whisk dust more efficiently into the onboard bin, instead of leaving it to clog up the filters. Water is ozonated in the base station to further improve cleaning performance, and there’s an integrated detergent system too.

The robot itself can even be fitted with a fragrance diffuser, which makes your room smell nice after every clean; three different scents are included in the box and, along with the detergent, and can be replenished from Eufy’s website.

It navigates well, mostly avoiding contact with walls and doors while driving very closely to all manner of obstacles without pushing them around, driving over them or ingesting them. The S2 is good at climbing over raised carpets, rugs and door thresholds — something the Omni S1 struggled with – and the app does a great job of quickly mapping your home, with a simple editing system for labeling every room correctly, and even adding virtual furniture.

I was impressed by how quiet the Omni S2 is, even with its powerful Cyclone mode engaged, and how the base station doesn’t sound like an Airbus when emptying the robot. It’s a very expensive product, but one that looks good and performs extremely well.

Eufy Omni S2: price and availability

  • List price: $1,599 / £1,599 / AU$2,299
  • Launched: March 2026

Just two years on from the launch of the Omni S1 Pro, Eufy now has the Omni S2. This is now the company’s flagship robotic vacuum and mop, with a price, performance and feature set to match.

It carries a recommended retail price of $1,599 / £1,599 / AU$2,299, making it £300 more expensive than the S1 pro, which remains on sale. That’s an awful lot of money for a vacuum cleaner — especially when

Sign up for breaking news, reviews, opinion, top tech deals, and more.

Eufy’s own range of robovacs starts under the £150 mark, and one of my favourites — the X10 Pro Omni vacuum and mop — is a comparative snip at £599.

What does the extra £1,000 get you with the S2? More power, of course, with greater suction thanks to Eufy’s new AeroTurbo 2.0 tech, improved intelligence, greater threshold clearance, a more powerful mop, better computer vision, a self-cleaning mop, electrolysed water, integrated detergent and even a built-in fragrance system with three included scents to pick from.

An additional cost to bear in mind is Eufy’s replacement parts kit. The brushes, bags, mops and rollers of all vacuum cleaners need replacing, so ongoing costs aren’t unusual, but Eufy likes to charge plenty. A complete kit for the S2 is £79.99. Premium parts for a premium robovac, I suppose. More welcome is Eufy’s new two-year warranty, which applies to all robot vacuums launched in 2026 and doubles the previous coverage.

  • Value score: 3.5/5

Eufy Omni S2: design

  • Docking station with charger, dust bag, water tanks and mop drying
  • Rotating, self-cleaning mop
  • Integrated detergent and fragrance supply

The S2 has a similar but more refined look than its S1 predecessor. The subtle bronze tint to sections of the robot and docking station give it a premium aesthetic that blends nicely with the futuristic lighting in both the clean water tank of the dock, and the robot’s onboard dust bin.

Taller than many docking stations, but significantly more elegant than most, the Omni S2’s appearance helps to justify its lofty price tag — and that’s further aided by the display and touch controls on top of the dock. These are handily located to press without stooping down to the robot itself, while the screen is useful for checking on the robot’s status and spotting error messages.

Image

1

of

4

Short of making you a cup of tea while the robot cleans up, the S2’s docking station does absolutely everything. It charges the robot, empties its dust bin, replenishes its water supply (and even ozonates fresh water before it’s fed to the mop), cleans the mop with water heated to 70 degrees centigrade, dries it with hot air, refills the detergent tank, and has enough dust bin capacity for up to a claimed 68 days between bag replacements.

The robot itself is almost circular, with a central roller that’s claimed to be 100 percent tangle free, a pair of spinning side brushes, and a roller mop that self-cleans, slides outwards by 1.5cm to reach into corners and even an onboard fragrance supply to make your home smell nice. The S2 includes three different fragrances in the box, but these are a bespoke design so replacements can only be bought from Eufy itself. The same goes for the detergent bottle too, while thankfully the 2.5-litre dust bags are generic.

Image

1

of

4

I like how the Omni S2 looks. Its design is more sophisticated than that of the S1, and I can imagine it neatly complementing the lavish houses of its deep-pocketed buyers. And while tall, at 670mm (26.4 inches), the docking station is relatively slim.

The robot is also relatively short, at 85mm. This compares favorably against taller, bulkier robovacs like the Dyson Spot+Scrub AI, which towers over the Eufy at 110mm and is less capable of cleaning beneath low furniture.

A welcome design upgrade for the Eufy Omni S2 is its ability to now clear door thresholds up to 4.2cm tall, up from just 2cm for the Omni S1. I was often left frustrated by that robot’s inability to drive up from exposed floorboards to a carpeted neighboring room, but have had no such issues with the S2.

  • Design score: 5/5

Eufy Omni S2: performance

  • Impressive vacuuming
  • Excellent mopping
  • Strong improvement over the S1

From the setup process and mapping, to vacuuming, mopping, navigation and self-cleaning, the Omni S2 is a triumph. You might say it should well be for the massive price tag, but even in 2026 it’s rare for such a complex new product to impress so universally. Where the Eufy Omni S1 struggled in some key areas — navigation, threshold clearance and sometimes even vacuuming — the S2’s performance is close to perfect.

Yes, it’s an ultra-premium product with a price to match. This is right up there with your Leica camera, Rimowa suitcase and five-figure turntable. I imagine the typical Omni S2 owner is the sort of person who wouldn't blink at splashing out on a pair of Apple AirPods Max 2 at the airport because they forgot their first-gens at home. They’d probably deal with a flight delay by picking up a new Swiss watch, too.

And that’s absolutely fine. Whatever the product, there’s always something that happens to sell the most expensive one, and for robotic vacuums that just so happens to be Eufy with the Omni S2. That doesn’t inherently count against it, because there are always customers happy to pay a premium for the one they like, or not really care about the cost because the S2’s spec sheet, design and feature set already put it at the top of the market.

What matters is how it performs in the real world, and how that compares to user expectations. Naturally, mine were at an all-time high and the S2 mostly delivered. The vacuuming performance is noticeably better than with the S1, and after a month of testing I still smile at the neat stripes vacuumed into my lounge carpet — and at how pleasant the S2’s fragrance system makes every room smell.

Eufy has improved navigation since the S1, and now the S2 is smart enough to not vacuum over the tasselled ends of a rug. It also automatically detects rug and carpet thickness, then raises itself by up to 50mm (1.97 inches) to prevent getting stuck in deep-pile fabric. In my testing, the S2 flagged a potentially tricky bit of carpet — which was actually an integrated but deeply contoured door mat — so I could tell it to ignore the concern or permanently avoid it.

Navigation and map creation is generally good. The robot only once got stuck and called for help, and I was impressed by how quickly the S2 mapped the ground floor of my home and did a decent job of detecting room boundaries. I used the app to fine-tune these, and was pleased to see how the S2 had added 3D cupboards, sofas, tables, chairs and other bits of furniture to the map. This isn’t strictly necessary, but it’s nice to see how the S2 correctly understands its environment.

Eufy claims a maximum suction of 30,000Pa, which is a huge upgrade over the 8,000Pa of the Omni S1 and other Eufy robots like the X10. There are four suction modes — Quiet, Standard, Turbo and Max — three options of cleaning intensity, three water levels, and the option of performing each cleaning task once or twice. As with the S1, the S2 returns to base whenever it needs to empty its bin, clean the mop, replenish its water supply or charge the battery. A mode called AI Automation promises to adjust cleaning strategy based on room type, floor material and cleaning frequency.

The Omni S2 deeply impressed during the first few weeks of general use, keeping hard floors and carpets clean — even after a cockapoo puppy joined our household, and his insistence on helping with garden projects brought a lot of dirt into the house. It was a joy, quite frankly, to have the S2 on hand, ready to clean up after every chaotic evening of dog zoomies.

I also loved how the S2 kept itself clean. Not only is the mop cleaned and dried with every use, but the cyclone-style dust collection ensures the onboard bin is practically spotless after each empty, and the filters don’t get clogged up. The rollers also looked like new after many hours of use, thanks to an anti-tangle design that actually works.

The mopping system works as well as the S1’s — evidenced by the absolutely filthy water collected in the waste tank of the docking station. I’d recommend owners empty this frequently, because if you wait a couple of weeks or so until it’s full, pouring it away is a seriously stinky process.

During TechRadar’s standardized robovac tests the Omni S2 continued to perform very well. These tests include two rounds of vacuuming on both carpets and hard floors, plus an obstacle avoidance test and a mopping test.

Pleasingly, the Omni S2’s vacuum performance is better than its predecessor, the two-year-old Omni S1. Vacuuming up oats from carpet was particularly impressive, with not a single piece being missed (except where I set the target zone in slightly the wrong place).

During these tests I found the quickest, least powerful mode, called Quiet, was indeed very quiet (just 55 decibels on carpet), but the S2 performs best when suction is upped to the Standard or Turbo modes, cleaning intensity is increased from Fast to Standard, and the S2 is asked to perform two passes of the target zone or room, instead of one.

A crumb mix made of flour and crushed biscuit was completely lifted from a wooden kitchen floor using the S2’s standard intensity and suction settings, while on carpet I found Turbo or Cyclone (the most powerful suction mode) was best.

With that enabled, plus the intensity increased to Deep and the number of passes upped to two, the robot did a superb job.

The oat test is usually tougher, because robovacs tend to flick larger debris across hard floors with their spinning side brushes. The Omni S2 fell foul of this too, but as ever my advice is to set the robot to vacuum the entire room twice, instead of aiming for a target and kicking it everywhere.

With the right settings applied, the S2 picked up every single piece – and passed the same test with flying colors on carpet too, where flicking debris is less of an issue.

I tested the mopping system with a dried smear of ketchup, which was promptly removed from the wooden floor. The cylindrical mop spins and pivots outwards to reach into the edges of the room, while the robot scrapes it clean and washes it while driving. The mop is then dried with hot air at the base station, which takes several hours but is very quiet.

Meanwhile, the S2’s obstacle avoidance saw it drive neatly around a shoe, a sock and a USB cable strewn across the floor. I was impressed by how close it got to each, with moving or ingesting anything.

Overall, the Eufy Omni S2 performed brilliantly. I would recommend using Standard intensity and Standard suction with two passes most of the time, then up the suction to Turbo or Cyclone for a deeper clean. The latter hitting just 70 decibels was also impressive — for context, my Dyson V10 stick vacuum is 90 dB at medium power.

Image

1

of

3

I only encountered one serious problem with the S2, and unfortunately it led to a replacement unit being provided by Eufy. The first S2 performed perfectly for a month, but developed a fault where the robot and docking station lost their connection. Several reboots and lots of advice from customer services failed to find a solution, so a second S2 was delivered and the original went back to Eufy for an inspection.

Naturally, this is disappointing for such an expensive product. But I was impressed by Eufy’s customer service department — which I approached as a customer and not a journalist — and how quickly the problem was resolved. The second unit performed perfectly throughout the rest of my test.

  • Performance score: 4.5/5

Eufy Omni S2: app

  • Easy to use
  • Lots of configurability
  • Also handles Eufy security products
  • Option to charge at night — great if you have an EV tariff

The Eufy app gets better with every revision, and today it’s one of the best robovac apps I’ve ever used. Everything is logically laid out, with just the right amount of adjustability on offer to keep both newcomers and power users happy. The app is quick, responsive and presents everything in a way that’s easy to understand.

I especially like how it adds virtual furniture to your floor maps, which makes it easier to understand the layout and visualize where the robot is. Editing floor plans also works well, with simple tools for splitting, combining and renaming rooms after the robot has created an initial (but not always accurate) map of your home. Multiple floormaps can also be created, making it easy to save a second map for your bedrooms upstairs, for example.

Image

1

of

2

Another feature I like is how pre-defined tasks can be created. I have one called “After dinner”, which tells the S2 to vacuum and mop my kitchen a certain way. A single tap of this from the Eufy app home screen, and the robot gets to work.

Since getting a puppy I’ve come to value Eufy’s child lock function, which disables the buttons on top of the robot – handy for both inquisitive children and dogs alike. I also like the off-peak charging function, where you can configure the S2 to only charge its battery at certain times of day. Since I have an electric car and an EV tariff, I’ve set the robovac to only charge at night, when my electricity is much cheaper.

  • App score: 4.5/5

Should you buy the Eufy Omni S2?

Swipe to scroll horizontally

Eufy Omni S2 score card

Attribute

Notes

Score

Value

The Eufy Omni S2 really is very expensive indeed. It isn’t the most expensive robovac of all time, but it’s right up there. And while its lofty price makes alternatives look like excellent value, the S2 doesn’t necessarily feel like a rip-off. It’s a high-quality appliance that performs brilliantly and looks good too.

3.5/5

Design

Eufy knocked it out of the park with the S2’s design. It’s aesthetically pleasing, has a smaller footprint than some rivals, and the robot slips beneath most furniture. It also drives over raised rugs and thresholds better than before and keeps itself incredibly clean. All I wish is for a way to prevent the waste water tank from getting quite so pungent — frequent empties are a must!

5/5

Performance

The Omni S2 is much better at vacuuming than the S1 was, while being just as good at mopping and navigation. All of these attributes are now top-notch, while the onboard fragrance system is a lovely extra touch and the improved ability to clamber over raised thresholds is very welcome

4.5/5

App

Eufy’s app is great. Its robovac section is simpler to navigate than the slightly cluttered security section, with an excellent mapping system, handy shortcuts for frequently used cleaning chores, and some little features that are massively useful — like off-peak charging and the child/pet lock.

5/5

Buy it if

How I tested the Eufy Omni S2

I lived with the Eufy Omni S2 for several weeks before writing this review. During that time it was used exclusively to vacuum the carpets and mop the floors of my house. I tested its cleaning abilities, tried some of the included fragrance diffusers, and noted how its self-cleaning systems fared after many hours of use.

I then carried out a number of specific tests to understand how well it cleans different types of debris from carpet and hard floors, how effective its mopping system is, how good it is at avoiding obstacles, and how loud it is.

First reviewed July 2026

Alistair Charlton is based in London and has worked as a freelance technology and automotive journalist for over a decade. A lifelong tech enthusiast, Alistair has written extensively about dash cams and robotic vacuum cleaners for TechRadar, among other products. As well as TechRadar, he also writes for Wired, T3, Forbes, The Independent, Digital Camera World and Grand Designs Magazine, among others.

The Omni S2 fell foul of this too, but as ever my advice is to set the robot to vacuum the entire room twice, instead of aiming for a target and kicking it everywhere.With the right settings applied, the S2 picked up every single piece – and passed the same test with flying colors on carpet too, where flicking debris is less of an issue.I tested the mopping system with a dried smear of ketchup, which was promptly removed from the wooden floor. The cylindrical mop spins and pivots outwards to reach into the edges of the room, while the robot scrapes it clean and washes it while driving. The mop is then dried with hot air at the base station, which takes several hours but is very quiet.Meanwhile, the S2’s obstacle avoidance saw it drive neatly around a shoe, a sock and a USB cable strewn across the floor. I was impressed by how close it got to each, with moving or ingesting anything.Overall, the Eufy Omni S2 performed brilliantly. I would recommend using Standard intensity and Standard suction with two passes most of the time, then up the suction to Turbo or Cyclone for a deeper clean. The latter hitting just 70 decibels was also impressive — for context, my Dyson V10 stick vacuum is 90 dB at medium power.Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)I only encountered one serious problem with the S2, and unfortunately it led to a replacement unit being provided by Eufy. The first S2 performed perfectly for a month, but developed a fault where the robot and docking station lost their connection. Several reboots and lots of advice from customer services failed to find a solution, so a second S2 was delivered and the original went back to Eufy for an inspection.Naturally, this is disappointing for such an expensive product. But I was impressed by Eufy’s customer service department — which I approached as a customer and not a journalist — and how quickly the problem was resolved. The second unit performed perfectly throughout the rest of my test.Performance score: 4.5/5Eufy Omni S2: appEasy to useLots of configurabilityAlso handles Eufy security productsOption to charge at night — great if you have an EV tariffThe Eufy app gets better with every revision, and today it’s one of the best robovac apps I’ve ever used. Everything is logically laid out, with just the right amount of adjustability on offer to keep both newcomers and power users happy. The app is quick, responsive and presents everything in a way that’s easy to understand.I especially like how it adds virtual furniture to your floor maps, which makes it easier to understand the layout and visualize where the robot is. Editing floor plans also works well, with simple tools for splitting, combining and renaming rooms after the robot has created an initial (but not always accurate) map of your home. Multiple floormaps can also be created, making it easy to save a second map for your bedrooms upstairs, for example.Image 1 of 2(Image credit: Future)Another feature I like is how pre-defined tasks can be created. I have one called “After dinner”, which tells the S2 to vacuum and mop my kitchen a certain way. A single tap of this from the Eufy app home screen, and the robot gets to work.Since getting a puppy I’ve come to value Eufy’s child lock function, which disables the buttons on top of the robot – handy for both inquisitive children and dogs alike. I also like the off-peak charging function, where you can configure the S2 to only charge its battery at certain times of day. Since I have an electric car and an EV tariff, I’ve set the robovac to only charge at night, when my electricity is much cheaper.App score: 4.5/5Should you buy the Eufy Omni S2?Swipe to scroll horizontallyEufy Omni S2 score cardAttributeNotesScoreValueThe Eufy Omni S2 really is very expensive indeed. It isn’t the most expensive robovac of all time, but it’s right up there. And while its lofty price makes alternatives look like excellent value, the S2 doesn’t necessarily feel like a rip-off. It’s a high-quality appliance that performs brilliantly and looks good too.3.5/5DesignEufy knocked it out of the park with the S2’s design. It’s aesthetically pleasing, has a smaller footprint than some rivals, and the robot slips beneath most furniture. It also drives over raised rugs and thresholds better than before and keeps itself incredibly clean. All I wish is for a way to prevent the waste water tank from getting quite so pungent — frequent empties are a must!5/5PerformanceThe Omni S2 is much better at vacuuming than the S1 was, while being just as good at mopping and navigation. All of these attributes are now top-notch, while the onboard fragrance system is a lovely extra touch and the improved ability to clamber over raised thresholds is very welcome4.5/5AppEufy’s app is great. Its robovac section is simpler to navigate than the slightly cluttered security section, with an excellent mapping system, handy shortcuts for frequently used cleaning chores, and some little features that are massively useful — like off-peak charging and the child/pet lock.5/5Buy it ifDon't buy it ifHow I tested the Eufy Omni S2I lived with the Eufy Omni S2 for several weeks before writing this review. During that time it was used exclusively to vacuum the carpets and mop the floors of my house. I tested its cleaning abilities, tried some of the included fragrance diffusers, and noted how its self-cleaning systems fared after many hours of use.I then carried out a number of specific tests to understand how well it cleans different types of debris from carpet and hard floors, how effective its mopping system is, how good it is at avoiding obstacles, and how loud it is.First reviewed July 2026 Alistair Charlton is based in London and has worked as a freelance technology and automotive journalist for over a decade. A lifelong tech enthusiast, Alistair has written extensively about dash cams and robotic vacuum cleaners for TechRadar, among other products. As well as TechRadar, he also writes for Wired, T3, Forbes, The Independent, Digital Camera World and Grand Designs Magazine, among others.

blocks.html_en: Eufy has taken the excellent mopping performance of the Omni S1 and paired it with vastly improved vacuuming to create the Omni S2. A self-cleaning and self-emptying robotic vacuum and mop, the S2 is as impressive as it is expensive, with excellent navigation skills, reliable obstacle avoidance and a brilliant app too. It even features an integrated detergent bottle and comes with three fragrance capsules that leave your home smelling nice after every clean. It does it all, but such knock-out performance comes at an equally shocking price.

sentences.en: Eufy Omni S2: two-minute review
sentences.zh: Eufy Omni S2：两分钟回顾

blocks.html_en: Eufy’s latest flagship robotic vacuum and mop, the Omni S2 is a hugely impressive appliance that combines excellent mopping with brilliant vacuuming to create one of the best home cleaning systems you can buy. It also self-cleans so thoroughly that, after several weeks of daily use, the dust bin, rollers and mop still looked like new.

sentences.en: Eufy’s latest flagship robotic vacuum and mop, the Omni S2 is a hugely impressive appliance that combines excellent mopping with brilliant vacuuming to create one of the best home cleaning systems you can buy.
sentences.zh: Omni S2 是 Eufy 最新的旗舰扫地机器人和拖把机器人，它是一款令人印象深刻的设备，它结合了出色的拖地功能和出色的吸尘功能，打造出您可以购买的最佳家庭清洁系统之一。

sentences.en: It also self-cleans so thoroughly that, after several weeks of daily use, the dust bin, rollers and mop still looked like new.
sentences.zh: 它还具有彻底的自清洁功能，经过几周的日常使用，垃圾箱、滚筒和拖把仍然看起来像新的一样。

blocks.html_en: The Omni S2 uses warm water to clean its spinning mop as it goes, while also scraping away dirt and using cyclone technology to whisk dust more efficiently into the onboard bin, instead of leaving it to clog up the filters. Water is ozonated in the base station to further improve cleaning performance, and there’s an integrated detergent system too.

sentences.en: The Omni S2 uses warm water to clean its spinning mop as it goes, while also scraping away dirt and using cyclone technology to whisk dust more efficiently into the onboard bin, instead of leaving it to clog up the filters.
sentences.zh: Omni S2 使用温水清洁旋转拖把，同时刮去污垢，并使用旋风分离器技术更有效地将灰尘扫入机载垃圾箱，而不是让它堵塞过滤器。

sentences.en: Water is ozonated in the base station to further improve cleaning performance, and there’s an integrated detergent system too.
sentences.zh: 水在基站中被臭氧化，以进一步提高清洁性能，并且还有一个集成的清洁剂系统。

blocks.html_en: The robot itself can even be fitted with a fragrance diffuser, which makes your room smell nice after every clean; three different scents are included in the box and, along with the detergent, and can be replenished from Eufy’s website.

sentences.en: The robot itself can even be fitted with a fragrance diffuser, which makes your room smell nice after every clean; three different scents are included in the box and, along with the detergent, and can be replenished from Eufy’s website.
sentences.zh: 机器人本身甚至可以配备香味扩散器，让您的房间在每次清洁后闻起来很香；盒子里包含三种不同的香味，以及清洁剂，并且可以从 Eufy 的网站上补充。

sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: It navigates well, mostly avoiding contact with walls and doors while driving very closely to all manner of obstacles without pushing them around, driving over them or ingesting them. The S2 is good at climbing over raised carpets, rugs and door thresholds — something the Omni S1 struggled with – and the app does a great job of quickly mapping your home, with a simple editing system for labeling every room correctly, and even adding virtual furniture.

sentences.en: It navigates well, mostly avoiding contact with walls and doors while driving very closely to all manner of obstacles without pushing them around, driving over them or ingesting them.
sentences.zh: 它的导航性能很好，主要是避免与墙壁和门接触，同时非常接近各种障碍物，而不会将它们推来推去，驶过它们或吞下它们。

sentences.en: The S2 is good at climbing over raised carpets, rugs and door thresholds — something the Omni S1 struggled with – and the app does a great job of quickly mapping your home, with a simple editing system for labeling every room correctly, and even adding virtual furniture.
sentences.zh: S2 擅长爬过凸起的地毯、毛毯和门槛——这是 Omni S1 所难以克服的——而且该应用程序可以很好地快速绘制您的家，并通过简单的编辑系统正确标记每个房间，甚至添加虚拟家具。

blocks.html_en: I was impressed by how quiet the Omni S2 is, even with its powerful Cyclone mode engaged, and how the base station doesn’t sound like an Airbus when emptying the robot. It’s a very expensive product, but one that looks good and performs extremely well.

sentences.en: I was impressed by how quiet the Omni S2 is, even with its powerful Cyclone mode engaged, and how the base station doesn’t sound like an Airbus when emptying the robot.
sentences.zh: 即使启用了强大的旋风模式，Omni S2 的安静程度也给我留下了深刻的印象，而且在清空机器人时，基站的声音听起来不像空客。

sentences.en: It’s a very expensive product, but one that looks good and performs extremely well.
sentences.zh: 这是一种非常昂贵的产品，但外观精美且性能极佳。

blocks.html_en: What does the extra £1,000 get you with the S2? More power, of course, with greater suction thanks to Eufy’s new AeroTurbo 2.0 tech, improved intelligence, greater threshold clearance, a more powerful mop, better computer vision, a self-cleaning mop, electrolysed water, integrated detergent and even a built-in fragrance system with three included scents to pick from.

blocks.html_en: An additional cost to bear in mind is Eufy’s replacement parts kit. The brushes, bags, mops and rollers of all vacuum cleaners need replacing, so ongoing costs aren’t unusual, but Eufy likes to charge plenty. A complete kit for the S2 is £79.99. Premium parts for a premium robovac, I suppose. More welcome is Eufy’s new two-year warranty, which applies to all robot vacuums launched in 2026 and doubles the previous coverage.

blocks.html_en: The S2 has a similar but more refined look than its S1 predecessor. The subtle bronze tint to sections of the robot and docking station give it a premium aesthetic that blends nicely with the futuristic lighting in both the clean water tank of the dock, and the robot’s onboard dust bin.

blocks.html_en: Taller than many docking stations, but significantly more elegant than most, the Omni S2’s appearance helps to justify its lofty price tag — and that’s further aided by the display and touch controls on top of the dock. These are handily located to press without stooping down to the robot itself, while the screen is useful for checking on the robot’s status and spotting error messages.

sentences.en: Taller than many docking stations, but significantly more elegant than most, the Omni S2’s appearance helps to justify its lofty price tag — and that’s further aided by the display and touch controls on top of the dock.
sentences.zh: Omni S2 比许多扩展坞更高，但比大多数扩展坞更加优雅，其外观有助于证明其高昂的价格标签是合理的 - 扩展坞顶部的显示屏和触摸控件进一步帮助了这一点。

sentences.en: These are handily located to press without stooping down to the robot itself, while the screen is useful for checking on the robot’s status and spotting error messages.
sentences.zh: 它们位置方便，无需弯腰靠近机器人本身即可按下，而屏幕可用于检查机器人的状态和发现错误消息。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: Short of making you a cup of tea while the robot cleans up, the S2’s docking station does absolutely everything. It charges the robot, empties its dust bin, replenishes its water supply (and even ozonates fresh water before it’s fed to the mop), cleans the mop with water heated to 70 degrees centigrade, dries it with hot air, refills the detergent tank, and has enough dust bin capacity for up to a claimed 68 days between bag replacements.

sentences.en: Short of making you a cup of tea while the robot cleans up, the S2’s docking station does absolutely everything.
sentences.zh: 除了在机器人打扫卫生时给你泡杯茶之外，S2 的扩展坞几乎可以做所有事情。

sentences.en: It charges the robot, empties its dust bin, replenishes its water supply (and even ozonates fresh water before it’s fed to the mop), cleans the mop with water heated to 70 degrees centigrade, dries it with hot air, refills the detergent tank, and has enough dust bin capacity for up to a claimed 68 days between bag replacements.
sentences.zh: 它为机器人充电、清空垃圾箱、补充供水（甚至在将淡水输送到拖把之前对淡水进行臭氧化）、用加热到 70 摄氏度的水清洁拖把、用热空气将其烘干、重新填充清洁剂箱，并且垃圾箱的容量据称可以在更换袋子之间长达 68 天。

blocks.html_en: The robot itself is almost circular, with a central roller that’s claimed to be 100 percent tangle free, a pair of spinning side brushes, and a roller mop that self-cleans, slides outwards by 1.5cm to reach into corners and even an onboard fragrance supply to make your home smell nice. The S2 includes three different fragrances in the box, but these are a bespoke design so replacements can only be bought from Eufy itself. The same goes for the detergent bottle too, while thankfully the 2.5-litre dust bags are generic.

sentences.en: The robot itself is almost circular, with a central roller that’s claimed to be 100 percent tangle free, a pair of spinning side brushes, and a roller mop that self-cleans, slides outwards by 1.5cm to reach into corners and even an onboard fragrance supply to make your home smell nice.
sentences.zh: 该机器人本身几乎是圆形的，有一个据称 100% 无缠结的中央滚筒、一对旋转侧刷、一个可自动清洁的滚筒拖把、向外滑动 1.5 厘米以到达角落，甚至还有一个车载香味供应装置，让你的家闻起来很香。

sentences.en: The S2 includes three different fragrances in the box, but these are a bespoke design so replacements can only be bought from Eufy itself.
sentences.zh: S2 的包装盒中包含三种不同的香水，但这些都是定制设计，因此只能从 Eufy 本身购买替代品。

sentences.en: The same goes for the detergent bottle too, while thankfully the 2.5-litre dust bags are generic.
sentences.zh: 洗涤剂瓶也是如此，幸好 2.5 升防尘袋是通用的。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: I like how the Omni S2 looks. Its design is more sophisticated than that of the S1, and I can imagine it neatly complementing the lavish houses of its deep-pocketed buyers. And while tall, at 670mm (26.4 inches), the docking station is relatively slim.

sentences.en: I like how the Omni S2 looks.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢 Omni S2 的外观。

sentences.en: Its design is more sophisticated than that of the S1, and I can imagine it neatly complementing the lavish houses of its deep-pocketed buyers.
sentences.zh: 它的设计比 S1 更加精致，我可以想象它能完美地搭配财力雄厚的买家的豪华住宅。

sentences.en: And while tall, at 670mm (26.4 inches), the docking station is relatively slim.
sentences.zh: 虽然坞站高 670 毫米（26.4 英寸），但相对纤薄。

blocks.html_en: The robot is also relatively short, at 85mm. This compares favorably against taller, bulkier robovacs like the Dyson Spot+Scrub AI, which towers over the Eufy at 110mm and is less capable of cleaning beneath low furniture.

sentences.en: The robot is also relatively short, at 85mm.
sentences.zh: 该机器人也相对较短，为 85 毫米。

sentences.en: This compares favorably against taller, bulkier robovacs like the Dyson Spot+Scrub AI, which towers over the Eufy at 110mm and is less capable of cleaning beneath low furniture.
sentences.zh: 这与戴森 Spot+Scrub AI 等更高、更笨重的扫地机器人相比具有优势，后者比 Eufy 高 110 毫米，并且清洁低矮家具下方的能力较差。

blocks.html_en: A welcome design upgrade for the Eufy Omni S2 is its ability to now clear door thresholds up to 4.2cm tall, up from just 2cm for the Omni S1. I was often left frustrated by that robot’s inability to drive up from exposed floorboards to a carpeted neighboring room, but have had no such issues with the S2.

sentences.en: A welcome design upgrade for the Eufy Omni S2 is its ability to now clear door thresholds up to 4.2cm tall, up from just 2cm for the Omni S1.
sentences.zh: Eufy Omni S2 的一个受欢迎的设计升级是它现在能够清除高达 4.2 厘米的门槛，而 Omni S1 的门槛仅为 2 厘米。

sentences.en: I was often left frustrated by that robot’s inability to drive up from exposed floorboards to a carpeted neighboring room, but have had no such issues with the S2.
sentences.zh: 我经常因为机器人无法从裸露的地板开到铺着地毯的隔壁房间而感到沮丧，但 S2 却没有遇到这样的问题。

sentences.en: Design score: 5/5
sentences.zh: 设计得分：5/5

sentences.en: Eufy Omni S2: performance
sentences.zh: Eufy Omni S2：性能

sentences.en: Impressive vacuuming
sentences.zh: 令人印象深刻的吸尘

sentences.en: Excellent mopping
sentences.zh: 优秀的拖地能力

sentences.en: Strong improvement over the S1
sentences.zh: 较S1有很大改进

blocks.html_en: From the setup process and mapping, to vacuuming, mopping, navigation and self-cleaning, the Omni S2 is a triumph. You might say it should well be for the massive price tag, but even in 2026 it’s rare for such a complex new product to impress so universally. Where the Eufy Omni S1 struggled in some key areas — navigation, threshold clearance and sometimes even vacuuming — the S2’s performance is close to perfect.

sentences.en: From the setup process and mapping, to vacuuming, mopping, navigation and self-cleaning, the Omni S2 is a triumph.
sentences.zh: 从设置过程和绘图，到吸尘、拖地、导航和自清洁，Omni S2 都取得了胜利。

sentences.en: You might say it should well be for the massive price tag, but even in 2026 it’s rare for such a complex new product to impress so universally.
sentences.zh: 你可能会说这应该是为了高昂的价格标签，但即使在 2026 年，如此复杂的新产品能够如此广泛地给人留下深刻印象也是很少见的。

sentences.en: Where the Eufy Omni S1 struggled in some key areas — navigation, threshold clearance and sometimes even vacuuming — the S2’s performance is close to perfect.
sentences.zh: Eufy Omni S1 在一些关键领域（导航、阈值间隙，有时甚至是吸尘）表现不佳，但 S2 的性能接近完美。

blocks.html_en: Yes, it’s an ultra-premium product with a price to match. This is right up there with your Leica camera, Rimowa suitcase and five-figure turntable. I imagine the typical Omni S2 owner is the sort of person who wouldn't blink at splashing out on a pair of Apple AirPods Max 2 at the airport because they forgot their first-gens at home. They’d probably deal with a flight delay by picking up a new Swiss watch, too.

sentences.en: Yes, it’s an ultra-premium product with a price to match.
sentences.zh: 是的，这是一款价格相匹配的超优质产品。

sentences.en: This is right up there with your Leica camera, Rimowa suitcase and five-figure turntable.
sentences.zh: 就在那里，还有您的徕卡相机、Rimowa 手提箱和五位数转盘。

sentences.en: I imagine the typical Omni S2 owner is the sort of person who wouldn't blink at splashing out on a pair of Apple AirPods Max 2 at the airport because they forgot their first-gens at home.
sentences.zh: 我想典型的 Omni S2 用户是那种在机场毫不犹豫地花钱购买一对 Apple AirPods Max 2 的人，因为他们把第一代产品忘在家里了。

sentences.en: They’d probably deal with a flight delay by picking up a new Swiss watch, too.
sentences.zh: 他们可能还会购买一块新的瑞士手表来应对航班延误的情况。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: And that’s absolutely fine. Whatever the product, there’s always something that happens to sell the most expensive one, and for robotic vacuums that just so happens to be Eufy with the Omni S2. That doesn’t inherently count against it, because there are always customers happy to pay a premium for the one they like, or not really care about the cost because the S2’s spec sheet, design and feature set already put it at the top of the market.

sentences.en: And that’s absolutely fine.
sentences.zh: 那绝对没问题。

sentences.en: Whatever the product, there’s always something that happens to sell the most expensive one, and for robotic vacuums that just so happens to be Eufy with the Omni S2.
sentences.zh: 无论是什么产品，总有一款产品能卖得最贵，而对于扫地机器人来说，Eufy 和 Omni S2 就是其中之一。

sentences.en: That doesn’t inherently count against it, because there are always customers happy to pay a premium for the one they like, or not really care about the cost because the S2’s spec sheet, design and feature set already put it at the top of the market.
sentences.zh: 这本质上并不会对它不利，因为总有客户愿意为他们喜欢的产品支付溢价，或者并不真正关心成本，因为 S2 的规格表、设计和功能集已经使其处于市场顶端。

blocks.html_en: What matters is how it performs in the real world, and how that compares to user expectations. Naturally, mine were at an all-time high and the S2 mostly delivered. The vacuuming performance is noticeably better than with the S1, and after a month of testing I still smile at the neat stripes vacuumed into my lounge carpet — and at how pleasant the S2’s fragrance system makes every room smell.

sentences.en: What matters is how it performs in the real world, and how that compares to user expectations.
sentences.zh: 重要的是它在现实世界中的表现如何，以及与用户期望的比较如何。

sentences.en: Naturally, mine were at an all-time high and the S2 mostly delivered.
sentences.zh: 当然，我的价格处于历史最高水平，S2 大部分已交付。

sentences.en: The vacuuming performance is noticeably better than with the S1, and after a month of testing I still smile at the neat stripes vacuumed into my lounge carpet — and at how pleasant the S2’s fragrance system makes every room smell.
sentences.zh: 吸尘性能明显优于 S1，经过一个月的测试，我仍然微笑着看到我的休闲地毯上吸出的整齐条纹，以及 S2 的香味系统让每个房间都散发出令人愉悦的气味。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: Eufy has improved navigation since the S1, and now the S2 is smart enough to not vacuum over the tasselled ends of a rug. It also automatically detects rug and carpet thickness, then raises itself by up to 50mm (1.97 inches) to prevent getting stuck in deep-pile fabric. In my testing, the S2 flagged a potentially tricky bit of carpet — which was actually an integrated but deeply contoured door mat — so I could tell it to ignore the concern or permanently avoid it.

sentences.en: Eufy has improved navigation since the S1, and now the S2 is smart enough to not vacuum over the tasselled ends of a rug.
sentences.zh: 自 S1 以来，Eufy 改进了导航功能，现在 S2 已经足够智能，不会用真空吸尘器吸过地毯的流苏末端。

sentences.en: It also automatically detects rug and carpet thickness, then raises itself by up to 50mm (1.97 inches) to prevent getting stuck in deep-pile fabric.
sentences.zh: 它还自动检测地毯和地毯的厚度，然后将其自身升高最多 50 毫米（1.97 英寸），以防止卡在深绒织物中。

sentences.en: In my testing, the S2 flagged a potentially tricky bit of carpet — which was actually an integrated but deeply contoured door mat — so I could tell it to ignore the concern or permanently avoid it.
sentences.zh: 在我的测试中，S2 标记了一块可能棘手的地毯——它实际上是一个集成但轮廓深刻的门垫——所以我可以告诉它忽略这个问题或永久避免它。

blocks.html_en: Navigation and map creation is generally good. The robot only once got stuck and called for help, and I was impressed by how quickly the S2 mapped the ground floor of my home and did a decent job of detecting room boundaries. I used the app to fine-tune these, and was pleased to see how the S2 had added 3D cupboards, sofas, tables, chairs and other bits of furniture to the map. This isn’t strictly necessary, but it’s nice to see how the S2 correctly understands its environment.

sentences.en: Navigation and map creation is generally good.
sentences.zh: 导航和地图创建总体来说不错。

sentences.en: The robot only once got stuck and called for help, and I was impressed by how quickly the S2 mapped the ground floor of my home and did a decent job of detecting room boundaries.
sentences.zh: 机器人只遇到过一次卡住并呼救的情况，S2 快速绘制出我家底层的地图并在检测房间边界方面表现出色，给我留下了深刻的印象。

sentences.en: I used the app to fine-tune these, and was pleased to see how the S2 had added 3D cupboards, sofas, tables, chairs and other bits of furniture to the map.
sentences.zh: 我使用该应用程序对这些进行了微调，并很高兴地看到 S2 如何在地图上添加 3D 橱柜、沙发、桌子、椅子和其他家具。

sentences.en: This isn’t strictly necessary, but it’s nice to see how the S2 correctly understands its environment.
sentences.zh: 这并不是绝对必要的，但很高兴看到 S2 如何正确理解其环境。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: Eufy claims a maximum suction of 30,000Pa, which is a huge upgrade over the 8,000Pa of the Omni S1 and other Eufy robots like the X10. There are four suction modes — Quiet, Standard, Turbo and Max — three options of cleaning intensity, three water levels, and the option of performing each cleaning task once or twice. As with the S1, the S2 returns to base whenever it needs to empty its bin, clean the mop, replenish its water supply or charge the battery. A mode called AI Automation promises to adjust cleaning strategy based on room type, floor material and cleaning frequency.

sentences.en: Eufy claims a maximum suction of 30,000Pa, which is a huge upgrade over the 8,000Pa of the Omni S1 and other Eufy robots like the X10.
sentences.zh: Eufy 声称最大吸力为 30,000Pa，这比 Omni S1 和 X10 等其他 Eufy 机器人的 8,000Pa 有了巨大的提升。

sentences.en: There are four suction modes — Quiet, Standard, Turbo and Max — three options of cleaning intensity, three water levels, and the option of performing each cleaning task once or twice.
sentences.zh: 有四种吸力模式 - 安静、标准、涡轮和最大 - 三种清洁强度选项、三种水位以及执行每个清洁任务一次或两次的选项。

sentences.en: As with the S1, the S2 returns to base whenever it needs to empty its bin, clean the mop, replenish its water supply or charge the battery.
sentences.zh: 与 S1 一样，S2 每当需要清空垃圾箱、清洁拖把、补充水源或给电池充电时都会返回底座。

sentences.en: A mode called AI Automation promises to adjust cleaning strategy based on room type, floor material and cleaning frequency.
sentences.zh: 一种名为“人工智能自动化”的模式承诺根据房间类型、地板材料和清洁频率调整清洁策略。

blocks.html_en: The Omni S2 deeply impressed during the first few weeks of general use, keeping hard floors and carpets clean — even after a cockapoo puppy joined our household, and his insistence on helping with garden projects brought a lot of dirt into the house. It was a joy, quite frankly, to have the S2 on hand, ready to clean up after every chaotic evening of dog zoomies.

sentences.en: The Omni S2 deeply impressed during the first few weeks of general use, keeping hard floors and carpets clean — even after a cockapoo puppy joined our household, and his insistence on helping with garden projects brought a lot of dirt into the house.
sentences.zh: Omni S2 在一般使用的最初几周给人留下了深刻的印象，即使在一只可卡犬小狗加入我们家之后，它仍然保持硬地板和地毯清洁，而且他坚持帮助进行花园工程，给房子带来了很多污垢。

sentences.en: It was a joy, quite frankly, to have the S2 on hand, ready to clean up after every chaotic evening of dog zoomies.
sentences.zh: 坦率地说，在每个混乱的狗变焦夜晚之后，手头有 S2，准备好进行清理，这是一种乐趣。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: I also loved how the S2 kept itself clean. Not only is the mop cleaned and dried with every use, but the cyclone-style dust collection ensures the onboard bin is practically spotless after each empty, and the filters don’t get clogged up. The rollers also looked like new after many hours of use, thanks to an anti-tangle design that actually works.

sentences.en: I also loved how the S2 kept itself clean.
sentences.zh: 我也喜欢 S2 保持自身清洁的方式。

sentences.en: Not only is the mop cleaned and dried with every use, but the cyclone-style dust collection ensures the onboard bin is practically spotless after each empty, and the filters don’t get clogged up.
sentences.zh: 拖把不仅在每次使用时都会得到清洁和干燥，而且旋风式集尘功能可确保机载垃圾箱在每次清空后几乎一尘不染，并且过滤器不会堵塞。

sentences.en: The rollers also looked like new after many hours of use, thanks to an anti-tangle design that actually works.
sentences.zh: 由于防缠结设计确实有效，使用多个小时后，滚轮看起来也像新的一样。

blocks.html_en: The mopping system works as well as the S1’s — evidenced by the absolutely filthy water collected in the waste tank of the docking station. I’d recommend owners empty this frequently, because if you wait a couple of weeks or so until it’s full, pouring it away is a seriously stinky process.

sentences.en: The mopping system works as well as the S1’s — evidenced by the absolutely filthy water collected in the waste tank of the docking station.
sentences.zh: 拖地系统的效果与 S1 一样好——扩展坞的废水箱中收集的绝对脏水就证明了这一点。

sentences.en: I’d recommend owners empty this frequently, because if you wait a couple of weeks or so until it’s full, pouring it away is a seriously stinky process.
sentences.zh: 我建议业主经常倒空，因为如果你等几周左右直到它装满，倒掉它是一个非常臭的过程。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: During TechRadar’s standardized robovac tests the Omni S2 continued to perform very well. These tests include two rounds of vacuuming on both carpets and hard floors, plus an obstacle avoidance test and a mopping test.

sentences.en: During TechRadar’s standardized robovac tests the Omni S2 continued to perform very well.
sentences.zh: 在 TechRadar 的标准化 robovac 测试中，Omni S2 继续表现出色。

sentences.en: These tests include two rounds of vacuuming on both carpets and hard floors, plus an obstacle avoidance test and a mopping test.
sentences.zh: 这些测试包括在地毯和硬地板上进行两轮吸尘，以及避障测试和拖地测试。

blocks.html_en: Pleasingly, the Omni S2’s vacuum performance is better than its predecessor, the two-year-old Omni S1. Vacuuming up oats from carpet was particularly impressive, with not a single piece being missed (except where I set the target zone in slightly the wrong place).

sentences.en: Pleasingly, the Omni S2’s vacuum performance is better than its predecessor, the two-year-old Omni S1.
sentences.zh: 令人高兴的是，Omni S2 的真空性能比其前身（已经上市两年的 Omni S1）更好。

sentences.en: Vacuuming up oats from carpet was particularly impressive, with not a single piece being missed (except where I set the target zone in slightly the wrong place).
sentences.zh: 从地毯上吸出燕麦的效果尤其令人印象深刻，没有遗漏任何一块（除了我将目标区域设置在稍微错误的位置的地方）。

blocks.html_en: During these tests I found the quickest, least powerful mode, called Quiet, was indeed very quiet (just 55 decibels on carpet), but the S2 performs best when suction is upped to the Standard or Turbo modes, cleaning intensity is increased from Fast to Standard, and the S2 is asked to perform two passes of the target zone or room, instead of one.

sentences.en: During these tests I found the quickest, least powerful mode, called Quiet, was indeed very quiet (just 55 decibels on carpet), but the S2 performs best when suction is upped to the Standard or Turbo modes, cleaning intensity is increased from Fast to Standard, and the S2 is asked to perform two passes of the target zone or room, instead of one.
sentences.zh: 在这些测试中，我发现最快、最弱的模式（称为安静）确实非常安静（地毯上只有 55 分贝），但当吸力增加到标准或涡轮模式、清洁强度从快速增加到标准、并且要求 S2 对目标区域或房间执行两次（而不是一次）时，S2 表现最佳。

blocks.html_en: A crumb mix made of flour and crushed biscuit was completely lifted from a wooden kitchen floor using the S2’s standard intensity and suction settings, while on carpet I found Turbo or Cyclone (the most powerful suction mode) was best.

sentences.en: A crumb mix made of flour and crushed biscuit was completely lifted from a wooden kitchen floor using the S2’s standard intensity and suction settings, while on carpet I found Turbo or Cyclone (the most powerful suction mode) was best.
sentences.zh: 使用 S2 的标准强度和吸力设置，可以将由面粉和碎饼干制成的面包屑混合物完全从木质厨房地板上提起，而在地毯上，我发现涡轮或旋风（最强大的吸力模式）效果最好。

blocks.html_en: With that enabled, plus the intensity increased to Deep and the number of passes upped to two, the robot did a superb job.

sentences.en: With that enabled, plus the intensity increased to Deep and the number of passes upped to two, the robot did a superb job.
sentences.zh: 启用此功能后，加上强度增加到“深度”，传球次数增加到两次，机器人做得非常出色。

blocks.html_en: The oat test is usually tougher, because robovacs tend to flick larger debris across hard floors with their spinning side brushes. The Omni S2 fell foul of this too, but as ever my advice is to set the robot to vacuum the entire room twice, instead of aiming for a target and kicking it everywhere.

sentences.en: The oat test is usually tougher, because robovacs tend to flick larger debris across hard floors with their spinning side brushes.
sentences.zh: 燕麦测试通常更难，因为机器人吸尘器倾向于用旋转的侧刷将较大的碎片弹过硬地板。

sentences.en: The Omni S2 fell foul of this too, but as ever my advice is to set the robot to vacuum the entire room twice, instead of aiming for a target and kicking it everywhere.
sentences.zh: Omni S2 也遇到了这个问题，但我的建议是让机器人对整个房间进行两次吸尘，而不是瞄准一个目标并将其踢得到处都是。

blocks.html_en: With the right settings applied, the S2 picked up every single piece – and passed the same test with flying colors on carpet too, where flicking debris is less of an issue.

sentences.en: With the right settings applied, the S2 picked up every single piece – and passed the same test with flying colors on carpet too, where flicking debris is less of an issue.
sentences.zh: 应用正确的设置后，S2 拾取了每一块碎片，并在地毯上出色地通过了相同的测试，在地毯上弹起碎片不再是问题。

blocks.html_en: I tested the mopping system with a dried smear of ketchup, which was promptly removed from the wooden floor. The cylindrical mop spins and pivots outwards to reach into the edges of the room, while the robot scrapes it clean and washes it while driving. The mop is then dried with hot air at the base station, which takes several hours but is very quiet.

blocks.html_en: Meanwhile, the S2’s obstacle avoidance saw it drive neatly around a shoe, a sock and a USB cable strewn across the floor. I was impressed by how close it got to each, with moving or ingesting anything.

blocks.html_en: Overall, the Eufy Omni S2 performed brilliantly. I would recommend using Standard intensity and Standard suction with two passes most of the time, then up the suction to Turbo or Cyclone for a deeper clean. The latter hitting just 70 decibels was also impressive — for context, my Dyson V10 stick vacuum is 90 dB at medium power.

blocks.html_en: I only encountered one serious problem with the S2, and unfortunately it led to a replacement unit being provided by Eufy. The first S2 performed perfectly for a month, but developed a fault where the robot and docking station lost their connection. Several reboots and lots of advice from customer services failed to find a solution, so a second S2 was delivered and the original went back to Eufy for an inspection.

blocks.html_en: Since getting a puppy I’ve come to value Eufy’s child lock function, which disables the buttons on top of the robot – handy for both inquisitive children and dogs alike. Since I have an electric car and an EV tariff, I’ve set the robovac to only charge at night, when my electricity is much cheaper.

blocks.html_en: I lived with the Eufy Omni S2 for several weeks before writing this review. During that time it was used exclusively to vacuum the carpets and mop the floors of my house. I tested its cleaning abilities, tried some of the included fragrance diffusers, and noted how its self-cleaning systems fared after many hours of use.

content_html_zh:
Eufy 借鉴了 Omni S1 出色的拖地性能，并将其与大幅改进的吸尘功能相结合，创造了 Omni S2。 S2 是一款自动清洁、自动清空的吸尘机器人和拖把机器人，它的价格昂贵，但令人印象深刻，具有出色的导航能力、可靠的避障功能以及出色的应用程序。 它甚至还配有一个集成的洗涤剂瓶，并配有三个香味胶囊，让您的家在每次清洁后闻起来很香。 它做到了这一切，但如此出色的性能却付出了同样令人震惊的代价。

Pros

  • +出色的拖地能力
  • +强力吸尘
  • +时尚、优质的设计
  • +出色的地图和导航

Cons

  • - 非常昂贵
  • - 非常偶然的导航问题
  • - 硬件故障需要更换单元

Eufy Omni S2：两分钟回顾

Omni S2 是 Eufy 最新的旗舰扫地机器人和拖把机器人，它是一款令人印象深刻的设备，它结合了出色的拖地功能和出色的吸尘功能，打造出您可以购买的最佳家庭清洁系统之一。 它还具有彻底的自清洁功能，经过几周的日常使用，垃圾箱、滚筒和拖把仍然看起来像新的一样。

Omni S2 使用温水清洁旋转拖把，同时刮去污垢，并使用旋风分离器技术更有效地将灰尘扫入机载垃圾箱，而不是让它堵塞过滤器。 水在基站中被臭氧化，以进一步提高清洁性能，并且还有一个集成的清洁剂系统。

机器人本身甚至可以配备香味扩散器，让您的房间在每次清洁后闻起来很香；盒子里包含三种不同的香味，以及清洁剂，并且可以从 Eufy 的网站上补充。

它的导航性能很好，主要是避免与墙壁和门接触，同时非常接近各种障碍物，而不会将它们推来推去，驶过它们或吞下它们。 S2 擅长爬过凸起的地毯、毛毯和门槛——这是 Omni S1 所难以克服的——而且该应用程序可以很好地快速绘制您的家，并通过简单的编辑系统正确标记每个房间，甚至添加虚拟家具。

即使启用了强大的旋风模式，Omni S2 的安静程度也给我留下了深刻的印象，而且在清空机器人时，基站的声音听起来不像空客。 这是一种非常昂贵的产品，但外观精美且性能极佳。

Eufy Omni S2：设计

  • 带充电器、集尘袋、水箱和拖把烘干机的扩展坞
  • 旋转自清洁拖把
  • 集成洗涤剂和香料供应

S2 的外观与其前身 S1 相似但更精致。 机器人和坞站部分的微妙青铜色赋予其高级美感，与坞站净水箱和机器人车载垃圾箱中的未来派照明完美融合。

Omni S2 比许多扩展坞更高，但比大多数扩展坞更加优雅，其外观有助于证明其高昂的价格标签是合理的 - 扩展坞顶部的显示屏和触摸控件进一步帮助了这一点。 它们位置方便，无需弯腰靠近机器人本身即可按下，而屏幕可用于检查机器人的状态和发现错误消息。

Eufy Omni S2：性能

  • 令人印象深刻的吸尘
  • 优秀的拖地能力
  • 较S1有很大改进

从设置过程和绘图，到吸尘、拖地、导航和自清洁，Omni S2 都取得了胜利。 你可能会说这应该是为了高昂的价格标签，但即使在 2026 年，如此复杂的新产品能够如此广泛地给人留下深刻印象也是很少见的。 Eufy Omni S1 在一些关键领域（导航、阈值间隙，有时甚至是吸尘）表现不佳，但 S2 的性能接近完美。

是的，这是一款价格相匹配的超优质产品。 就在那里，还有您的徕卡相机、Rimowa 手提箱和五位数转盘。 我想典型的 Omni S2 用户是那种在机场毫不犹豫地花钱购买一对 Apple AirPods Max 2 的人，因为他们把第一代产品忘在家里了。 他们可能还会购买一块新的瑞士手表来应对航班延误的情况。

那绝对没问题。 无论是什么产品，总有一款产品能卖得最贵，而对于扫地机器人来说，Eufy 和 Omni S2 就是其中之一。 这本质上并不会对它不利，因为总有客户愿意为他们喜欢的产品支付溢价，或者并不真正关心成本，因为 S2 的规格表、设计和功能集已经使其处于市场顶端。

重要的是它在现实世界中的表现如何，以及与用户期望的比较如何。 当然，我的价格处于历史最高水平，S2 大部分已交付。 吸尘性能明显优于 S1，经过一个月的测试，我仍然微笑着看到我的休闲地毯上吸出的整齐条纹，以及 S2 的香味系统让每个房间都散发出令人愉悦的气味。

自 S1 以来，Eufy 改进了导航功能，现在 S2 已经足够智能，不会用真空吸尘器吸过地毯的流苏末端。 它还自动检测地毯和地毯的厚度，然后将其自身升高最多 50 毫米（1.97 英寸），以防止卡在深绒织物中。 在我的测试中，S2 标记了一块可能棘手的地毯——它实际上是一个集成但轮廓深刻的门垫——所以我可以告诉它忽略这个问题或永久避免它。

导航和地图创建总体来说不错。 机器人只遇到过一次卡住并呼救的情况，S2 快速绘制出我家底层的地图并在检测房间边界方面表现出色，给我留下了深刻的印象。 我使用该应用程序对这些进行了微调，并很高兴地看到 S2 如何在地图上添加 3D 橱柜、沙发、桌子、椅子和其他家具。 这并不是绝对必要的，但很高兴看到 S2 如何正确理解其环境。

Eufy 声称最大吸力为 30,000Pa，这比 Omni S1 和 X10 等其他 Eufy 机器人的 8,000Pa 有了巨大的提升。 有四种吸力模式 - 安静、标准、涡轮和最大 - 三种清洁强度选项、三种水位以及执行每个清洁任务一次或两次的选项。 与 S1 一样，S2 每当需要清空垃圾箱、清洁拖把、补充水源或给电池充电时都会返回底座。 一种名为“人工智能自动化”的模式承诺根据房间类型、地板材料和清洁频率调整清洁策略。

Omni S2 在一般使用的最初几周给人留下了深刻的印象，即使在一只可卡犬小狗加入我们家之后，它仍然保持硬地板和地毯清洁，而且他坚持帮助进行花园工程，给房子带来了很多污垢。 坦率地说，在每个混乱的狗变焦夜晚之后，手头有 S2，准备好进行清理，这是一种乐趣。

我也喜欢 S2 保持自身清洁的方式。 拖把不仅在每次使用时都会得到清洁和干燥，而且旋风式集尘功能可确保机载垃圾箱在每次清空后几乎一尘不染，并且过滤器不会堵塞。 由于防缠结设计确实有效，使用多个小时后，滚轮看起来也像新的一样。

拖地系统的效果与 S1 一样好——扩展坞的废水箱中收集的绝对脏水就证明了这一点。 我建议业主经常倒空，因为如果你等几周左右直到它装满，倒掉它是一个非常臭的过程。

在 TechRadar 的标准化 robovac 测试中，Omni S2 继续表现出色。 这些测试包括在地毯和硬地板上进行两轮吸尘，以及避障测试和拖地测试。

令人高兴的是，Omni S2 的真空性能比其前身（已经上市两年的 Omni S1）更好。 从地毯上吸出燕麦的效果尤其令人印象深刻，没有遗漏任何一块（除了我将目标区域设置在稍微错误的位置的地方）。

在这些测试中，我发现最快、最弱的模式（称为安静）确实非常安静（地毯上只有 55 分贝），但当吸力增加到标准或涡轮模式、清洁强度从快速增加到标准、并且要求 S2 对目标区域或房间执行两次（而不是一次）时，S2 表现最佳。

使用 S2 的标准强度和吸力设置，可以将由面粉和碎饼干制成的面包屑混合物完全从木质厨房地板上提起，而在地毯上，我发现涡轮或旋风（最强大的吸力模式）效果最好。

启用此功能后，加上强度增加到“深度”，传球次数增加到两次，机器人做得非常出色。

燕麦测试通常更难，因为机器人吸尘器倾向于用旋转的侧刷将较大的碎片弹过硬地板。 Omni S2 也遇到了这个问题，但我的建议是让机器人对整个房间进行两次吸尘，而不是瞄准一个目标并将其踢得到处都是。

应用正确的设置后，S2 拾取了每一块碎片，并在地毯上出色地通过了相同的测试，在地毯上弹起碎片不再是问题。

我用干番茄酱测试了拖地系统，番茄酱很快就从木地板上清除了。 圆柱形拖把旋转并向外旋转以到达房间的边缘，而机器人则在行驶时将其刮干净并清洗。 然后拖把在基站用热风吹干，这需要几个小时，但非常安静。

与此同时，S2 的避障功能使其能够整齐地绕过地板上散落的鞋子、袜子和 USB 电缆。 令我印象深刻的是它与每一个物体的距离有多近，无论是移动还是吞咽任何东西。

总体而言，Eufy Omni S2 表现出色。 我建议大多数时候使用标准强度和标准吸力两次通过，然后将吸力提高到涡轮或旋风以进行更深层次的清洁。 后者仅 70 分贝的声音也令人印象深刻 - 就上下文而言，我的戴森 V10 吸尘棒在中等功率下为 90 分贝。

Eufy Omni S2：应用程序

  • 便于使用
  • 大量的可配置性
  • 还经营 Eufy 安全产品
  • 可选择夜间充电——如果您有电动汽车关税，那就太棒了

Eufy 应用程序每次修订都会变得更好，今天它是我用过的最好的 robovac 应用程序之一。 一切都按逻辑布局，并提供适当的可调整性，让新手和高级用户都满意。 该应用程序快速、响应灵敏，并以易于理解的方式呈现所有内容。

我特别喜欢它如何将虚拟家具添加到楼层地图中，这样可以更轻松地理解布局并可视化机器人的位置。 编辑平面图也很有效，在机器人创建了您家的初始（但并不总是准确）地图后，可以使用简单的工具来分割、组合和重命名房间。 还可以创建多个楼层地图，例如，可以轻松地为楼上的卧室保存第二张地图。
